THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COBB, TINA M. HOLMES, ANTOINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 431 BAY ST. #317 S.F, CA. 94133 $760.08 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $760.08, LEASE FORFEITED, PLUS COSTS PER COST BILL. MONEY JUDGMENT & COSTS ARE LIMITED TO DEFT, TINA M. COBB. JUDGMENT VS. ANTOINE HOLMES IS FOR POSSESSION ONLY.
